# 2.5 Workflow Definition Schema

Workflow definitions stored in GCS as JSON. Launcher reads at runtime and passes full config to Cloud Run Jobs API. No redeployment needed for launch parameter changes.

## Top-Level Structure

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `WorkflowDefinition` | workflowId: String, name: String, steps: List[WorkflowStepDefinition], schedule: Option[String] (cron) | Complete workflow DAG template in GCS |

## Step Definition

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `WorkflowStepDefinition` | stepName: String (unique, PK in `workflow_run_steps`, dependency reference), triggeredBy: List[String] (event types), dependencies: List[String] (stepName values), container: ContainerConfig, resources: ResourceConfig, execution: ExecutionConfig, networking: NetworkConfig, volumes: VolumeConfig, identity: IdentityConfig, healthChecks: HealthCheckConfig, metadata: MetadataConfig | Complete Cloud Run Job spec. `stepName` is both identifier and human name. |

## Container Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `ContainerConfig` | image: String, command: Option[List[String]] (entrypoint override), args: List[String] (macro support: `{{run_id}}`, `{{date}}`, `{{timestamp}}`, `{{message.*}}`), env: Map[String, String], secretMounts: Map[String, String] (env var → Secret Manager path) | Launcher never sees secret values, only reference paths |

## Resource Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `ResourceConfig` | cpu: String (default "1": "1", "2", "4", "6", "8"), memory: String (default "512Mi", up to "32Gi"), gpu: Option[String] | Per-step allocation |

## Execution Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `ExecutionConfig` | timeout: String (default "10m", max "168h"), maxRetries: Int (0-10, default 3), taskCount: Int (1-10000, default 1), parallelism: Int (default 1) | Cloud Run Job execution params |

## Network Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `NetworkConfig` | vpcConnector: Option[String] (VPC connector for AlloyDB private IP), vpcEgress: Option[String] ("all-traffic" or "private-ranges-only"), cloudSqlConnections: List[String] (Cloud SQL instances — dev only) | Networking for Cloud Run Job |

## Volume Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `VolumeConfig` | gcsVolumes: Map[String, String] (mount path → GCS bucket), inMemoryVolumes: Map[String, String] (mount path → size limit) | Storage mounts |

## Identity Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `IdentityConfig` | serviceAccount: String | Run as: launcher_sa, ingestion_sa, analysis_sa, scoring_sa |

## Health Check Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `ProbeConfig` | initialDelaySeconds: Int (0-240, default 0), timeoutSeconds: Int (1-3600, default 1), periodSeconds: Int (10-240, default 10), failureThreshold: Int (default 3) | Shared startup/liveness probe config |
| `HealthCheckConfig` | startupProbe: Option[ProbeConfig], livenessProbe: Option[ProbeConfig] | Container health checks |

## Metadata Configuration

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `MetadataConfig` | labels: Map[String, String] (cost tracking, environment), annotations: Map[String, String] | Cloud Run Job labels and annotations |

## Macro Resolution

Launcher replaces tokens in `args` and `env` values before launch:

| Macro | Source | Example |
|-------|--------|---------|
| `{{run_id}}` | Workflow run ID | `"a1b2c3d4-..."` |
| `{{date}}` | Current date (ISO-8601) | `"2026-03-30"` |
| `{{timestamp}}` | Current timestamp (ISO-8601) | `"2026-03-30T12:00:00Z"` |
| `{{message.*}}` | Pub/Sub message payload field | `{{message.billId}}` → `"hr1319-117"` |

Framework is extensible — new macros added without schema changes.

## Workflow Versioning

Definitions versioned in GCS with semver filenames (e.g., `workflows/daily-ingestion-v1.2.0.json`). Launcher records `workflow_definition_path` in `workflow_runs` at start — pins run to exact version. Reads definition once at run start; does not re-read.

## Acceptance Criteria

**Functional:**
1. `WorkflowDefinition` has Circe `Encoder`/`Decoder` for JSON I/O in GCS.
2. All nested types have Circe codecs.
3. No circular dependencies in step graph validated at construction.
4. All `stepName` references in `dependencies` exist in `steps` list.
5. `ContainerConfig.secretMounts` stores only Secret Manager paths — never values.
6. `ResourceConfig.cpu` validated against ("1", "2", "4", "6", "8").
7. `ResourceConfig.memory` validated format (number + Mi/Gi).
8. `ExecutionConfig.maxRetries` validated 0-10.
9. `ExecutionConfig.taskCount` validated 1-10000.
10. `ProbeConfig` field ranges validated.
11. Sensible defaults — step with only `image` launchable with all defaults.
12. `WorkflowStepDefinition.triggeredBy` lists triggering event types.

**Error Handling:**
13. `WorkflowDefinition` construction returns `Either[String, WorkflowDefinition]` — `Left` on circular deps, missing refs, invalid config.
14. Malformed JSON from GCS returns descriptive error including path and parse failure.

**Tests:**
15. Valid DAG construction succeeds.
16. Circular dependency (A → B → A) returns `Left` with descriptive error.
17. Dependency referencing non-existent `stepName` returns `Left`.
18. Invalid CPU value returns `Left`.
19. Invalid memory format returns `Left`.
20. All config types with defaults-only construct validly.
21. Circe round-trip: all fields populated.
22. Circe round-trip: minimal fields with defaults applied.
